generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData1
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData2
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10°C to +85°C range"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData3
]

instance TemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1
]

instance TemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor2
]

instance TemperatureData3 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData1Instance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from DS18S20Sensor1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance TemperatureData2Instance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from DS18S20Sensor2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance TemperatureData3Instance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from DS18S20Sensor3"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData3
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs handling up to 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "0.03 m³ volume styrofoam insulated container"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time temperature data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PythonScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language with Scipy optimization library for model execution and calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for hardware/software specifications"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Energy balance model between air and environment with 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model including heatbed thermal inertia with four parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyLibrary
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms using non-linear least squares optimization (Scipy) for model parameter refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyImprovement
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance including control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingDuration
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service for thermal incubator system"
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service for thermal incubator system"
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for thermal incubator system parameters"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model-based temperature predictions for control decisions"
]

instance ModelAccuracyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration updates model parameters to improve accuracy"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heating duration based on temperature trends"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into electrical signals for the heatbed (via MOSFETs) and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system where RabbitMQ facilitates communication between the Raspberry Pi-based controller, low-level driver, and hardware components (sensors/actuators), with simulation models running in the virtual layer to interact with the physical twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is integrated during the 'as operated' phase, as the document states 'Once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing simulated outputs with experimental data; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor placement experiments; Model B showed better prediction of thermal inertia due to including heatbed heat accumulation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange over TCP/IP, 1-Wire bus for sensor communication, GPIO pins on Raspberry Pi for interfacing with hardware components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with open-source code available in a GitHub repository."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety, and PCB design uses optocouplers for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current circuits to prevent unsafe states."
]
